---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature address? What's the user pain point?

## Proposed Solution

How do you envision this feature working? Include any UI/UX ideas, API changes, or data model changes.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've considered and why you favour your proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, related issues, or any other context.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
